commands.command: re-review — real behavior proof ci now passes (completed/success). proof section present with all 6 required fields
commands.freeform_prompt: — Real behavior proof CI now passes (completed/success). Proof section present with all 6 required fields.

target.title: fix(hooks): wire message:sending internal hook to user-defined hooks
target.body:
## Problem
Internal `message_sending` hook fires only through the typed plugin hook runner and bridges only `message:sent` to internal hooks. User-defined hook handlers configured under `message:sending` never receive outbound message events.

Fixes #73542

## Root Cause
The internal hook bridge only registered `message:sent` (post-send notification) and had no internal bridge for `message:sending` (pre-send interception). Underscore-key dispatch (`message_sending` ↔ `message:sending`) was also missing.

## Fix
Add an internal `message:sending` bridge with underscore-key dispatch, wire it into core outbound delivery in `src/infra/outbound/deliver.ts`, and update hook/outbound tests. Also add heartbeat `message_tool_only` raw reply suppression.

## Real Behavior Proof

- **Behavior addressed**: User-defined `message:sending` hook handlers never fired because no internal bridge existed from the hook runner to outbound message delivery. After the fix, `message:sending` fires through the internal hook bridge before messages are delivered.
- **Real environment tested**: Linux (Node.js 22), openclaw development checkout with pnpm, vitest 4.1.8.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `node ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts`
- **Evidence after fix**:
```
$ node ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.infra.config.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 /home/user/openclaw

 Test Files  2 passed (2)
      Tests  192 passed (192)
   Duration  ~17s
```
- **Observed result after fix**: All 192 hook and outbound delivery tests pass, covering the internal `message:sending` bridge, underscore-key dispatch (`message_sending` ↔ `message:sending`), and heartbeat tool-only suppression. User-defined `message:sending` hooks now receive outbound message events before delivery.
- **What was not tested**: Full end-to-end delivery with a connected channel (Telegram/WhatsApp) was not manually tested. The tests verify the internal bridge wiring and hook dispatch logic in isolation.
target.author: mazhuima
